title: ^ is not 'to the power of'
problem: Raise base (2) to the power of 3 (we want 8).

trace.checkpoint_prompt: base is 2. After `power = base ^ 3` runs, what will power be?

trace.note: power = 2 ^ 3 = 1, not 8. In Python `^` is bitwise XOR, not exponentiation — and 2 XOR 3 is 1. No error is raised; the answer is just silently wrong.
